RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO CONTEST GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFFS AND CROSS DEFENDANTS NELSON OSORIO AND KKW TRUCKING is DENIED; the GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT BETWEEN PLAINTIFFS AND CROSS DEFENDANTS NELSON OSORIO AND KKW TRUCKING is GRANTED; in addition, the cross complaint filed against Defendants Nelson Osorio and KKW Trucking by Cross Complainant City and County of San Francisco is dismissed.
